name: default
description: Machine-readable sibling of the concept-explainer: a concept name, an intuition lead, a plain-prose mechanics explanation, a worked example, and a flat furtherReading array. Placeholder strings keep the file parseable; the agent expands the single furtherReading element into one entry per pointer.

slots.description: The one-sentence mental model, framed against the naive approach.
Plain-prose explanation of how the concept works and what it trades off.
A small worked example that makes the concept concrete.
Pointers to follow next; one entry each.
